question: Was the act committed with the intention of insulting a religion?

yes.question: Was the act committed in a place of worship or a place of sepulchre?

yes.name: Injuring or defiling place of worship with intent to insult religion of any class

no.name: Uttering words, etc., with deliberate intent to wound religious feelings of any person

no.question: Was the act committed with the intention of outraging the religious feelings of any class?

yes.name: Deliberate and malicious acts, intended to outrage religious feelings of any class by insulting its religion or religious beliefs

no.question: Was the act committed during a religious assembly?

sections.name: Injuring or defiling place of worship with intent to insult religion of any class.
Deliberate and malicious acts, intended to outrage religious feelings of any class by insulting its religion or religious beliefs.
Uttering words, etc., with deliberate intent to wound religious feelings of any person.
